The grad is walking down a Golden Path promised by their
manager, paved with shiny coins and accolades.
However, as they walk, the path begins to crumble.
They realise the golden path doesn't lead to riches,
it loops back to a £40k university masters course.
The grad is having a nightmare about how to turn on
the shower at a friends house without asking for help.
